text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "Execution of Rubeus.exe, a known Kerberos attack tool, with arguments to request a Ticket Granting Ticket (TGT) using an NTLM hash (/rc4) and creating a new process (cmd.exe) in a 'netonly' logon session, which is indicative of credential theft and lateral movement attempts.",
  "indicators": [
    "Rubeus.exe",
    "asktgt",
    "rc4",
    "createnetonly",
    "Kerberos abuse",
    "credential theft"
  ]
}
